value.expression: Dear $rSMS[1]$ $prompt-assignment$: This is a reminder that your account is past due on the amount of $rSMS[2]$. Your payment method has been declined or returned by your financial institution or is no longer valid. Please call us or email us today to resolve this matter. Please avoid any additional fees or further collection efforts that will affect your credit worthiness. We have options available. (281) 501-0645 (Option 1) / clients@lomsy.com Sincerely, loMsy Collection Team.
